queries.name: exists_subquery_in_where
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->(b:Person) } RETURN COUNT(*)

queries.name: count_subquery_in_return
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person) RETURN a.id, COUNT { MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->(b:Person) } AS degree ORDER BY a.id

queries.name: not_exists_subquery
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->(b:Person) } RETURN COUNT(*)

queries.name: exists_with_filter
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->(b:Person) WHERE b.fName = 'Bob' } RETURN a.fName

queries.name: correlated_multi_hop_exists
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->(:Person)-[:KNOWS]->(c:Person) } RETURN a.fName ORDER BY a.fName

queries.name: nested_filter_on_outer_binding
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person), (b:Person) WHERE a.id <> b.id AND EXISTS { MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->(c:Person) WHERE c.id = b.id } RETURN a.fName, b.fName ORDER BY a.fName, b.fName

queries.name: count_with_grouped_aggregate
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person) RETURN a.fName, COUNT { MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->(b:Person) WHERE b.fName STARTS WITH 'B' } AS b_friends ORDER BY a.fName

queries.name: multiple_subqueries
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Person) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->(b:Person) } AND COUNT { MATCH (a)-[:KNOWS]->(c:Person) } > 0 RETURN a.fName ORDER BY a.fName
